project.name: TILDA - Public Transport
project.description: TILDA processes public transport stops and stations from OpenStreetMap data as key destinations for bicycle infrastructure planning.

tags.description: Identifies tram stops for public transport processing.
Identifies railway stations for public transport processing.
Identifies railway halts (smaller stops) for public transport processing.
Identifies ferry terminals for public transport processing.
Classifies station as U-Bahn (subway) in public transport processing.
Classifies station as S-Bahn (light rail) in public transport processing.
Used for exclusion filtering of industrial, military, and other non-public transport railway usage.
Excludes disused transport stops from public transport processing.
Station or stop name used as display metadata.
Transport operator used as metadata for public transport stops.
